senses.gloss: to be bad, to be evil, to act badly
to be bad, to be evil, to act badly
to be bad, to be evil, to act badly

examples.text: وَيَدْعُ ٱلْإِنْسَانُ بِٱلشَّرِّ دُعَاءَهُ بِٱلْخَيْرِ ۖ وَكَانَ الْإِنْسَانُ عَجُولًا
examples.english: And man prays for evil as he prays for good. For man is ever hasty.

examples.text: فَمَنْ يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُ / وَمَنْ يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُ
examples.english: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it, / And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

senses.gloss: more evil, worse; most evil, worst
